rationale: The cited paper’s core construct—loyalty owned by an individual salesperson versus the firm—directly overlaps with the citing paper’s focus on how perceptions of a frontline agent spill over to firm-level outcomes (satisfaction, purchase behavior). Given this clear conceptual link in agent-versus-firm relationship effects, this is plausibly a theory/background anchor rather than an incidental mention, even though the raw evidence only confirms a DOI-matched reference entry.
